headline: Humana Inc. announced the results of its 2026 Annual Meeting, including the election of all ten director nominees, approval of the 2026 Stock Incentive Plan, and rejection of a stockholder proposal regarding golden parachutes.
investor_impact: Routine annual meeting results confirm stability in board composition and executive compensation structures. The rejection of the golden parachute shareholder proposal maintains management's flexibility in severance arrangements without altering the core investment thesis.
key_figures: PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP ratified as auditor for 2026
2026 Stock Incentive Plan approved with 97,655,200 votes for
Golden parachute proposal rejected with 59,079,279 votes against and 41,970,892 votes for
